response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience across high-scale environments (Stripe, Shopify, Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of req/s), strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based), and current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Stripe. However, the resume shows no direct experience architecting experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, telemetry foundations, or running statistical analysis/bias detection — the core of this Principal-level Growth/Experimentation role. Title progression also skews Senior rather than Principal/IC6, with limited evidence of multi-team architectural ownership at the scope this role requires.
strengths: 15+ years across high-scale systems including low-latency micro-services at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching/workshops
Current AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work at Stripe (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, feature flighting, or A/B testing infrastructure
No evidence of statistical analysis, metrics/guardrail design, or bias-detection work central to the role
Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and scope described suggest IC5-level impact rather than IC6/Principal cross-org influence

key_factors.factor: High-scale distributed systems and craftsmanship track record
Principal-level cross-team architectural leadership not evidenced
